scripts.check-scouts: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const mysql = require('mysql2/promise'); mysql.createConnection({host:'127.0.0.1',user:'root',password:'2003',database:'spms_db'}).then(async c => { const [rows] = await c.query('SELECT s.id, u.full_name FROM scouts s JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id'); console.log('REAL_SCOUTS:', rows); process.exit(); })"
